name: Parool — paywall verwijderen
description: Verbergt de DPG Media paywall overlay (zonder DOM-verwijdering) en toont artikeltekst
css: [data-temptation-position], .marketing-banner, .tm-ui, ._vis_hide_layer, [id^="_vis_opt"], .tm, .tm--inline { display: none !important; visibility: hidden !important; height: 0 !important; overflow: hidden !important; pointer-events: none !important; } .paywall { display: block !important; visibility: visible !important; opacity: 1 !important; height: auto !important; overflow: visible !important; max-height: none !important; } body { overflow: auto !important; }

name: NYTimes — paywall omzeilen
description: Verbergt gateway overlay en toont volledige article body (tekst zit in DOM voor SEO)
css: #gateway-container, [data-testid='gateway-container'], #standalone-footer, #dock-container, [data-testid='inline-message'], [data-testid='paywall'], [data-testid='subscription-nag'], [data-testid='dock-bar-wrapper'], [class*='subscriber-nag'], [class*='expanded-dock'] { display: none !important; visibility: hidden !important; height: 0 !important; overflow: hidden !important; } body, html { overflow: auto !important; position: static !important; } section[name='articleBody'], article[id='story'], [name='articleBody'] { max-height: none !important; overflow: visible !important; -webkit-mask-image: none !important; mask-image: none !important; opacity: 1 !important; height: auto !important; } section[name='articleBody'] > *, article[id='story'] > * { display: block !important; visibility: visible !important; opacity: 1 !important; }

name: Telegraaf — archive.ph lookup
description: Content zit niet in de HTML. Gremlin badge toont link naar archive.ph als het artikel daar beschikbaar is.

name: NRC — archive.ph lookup
description: Gremlin badge toont link naar archive.ph als het artikel daar beschikbaar is.
